summary: Custom printed logo plastic measuring tape for brand promotion, retail packaging, and private-label tool programs, with flexible shell color, logo placement, barcode, and packaging options.
targetBuyers: Brand owners, hardware importers, online sellers, retail tool buyers, promotional product buyers, and private-label distributors
sellingPoints: Custom printed logo for brand launches and retail shelf programs
Plastic shell and steel blade structure for practical measuring use
Flexible packaging options for online, wholesale, and hardware retail channels

specs.label: Length
specs.value: Common 3m, 5m, 7.5m, 16ft, 25ft, or buyer-specific lengths by model

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Plastic case, steel blade, metal hook, belt clip, wrist strap or lanyard options

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Printed logo, shell color, label design, blade unit, hook, belt clip, packaging artwork, barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: Color box, blister card, display box, hang card, bulk carton, buyer barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Depends on logo method, shell color, packaging structure, and order quantity

specs.label: OEM Service
specs.value: Logo artwork review, sample direction, packaging confirmation, and private-label production support

title: Custom Printed Logo Plastic Measuring Tape
quality: Logo position, print clarity, shell color, and surface appearance check
Blade readability, coating, number printing, and unit marking review
Lock, hook rivet, belt clip, and retraction function test
Packaging artwork, barcode label, carton mark, and pre-shipment quantity inspection
